details.message: Expected top-level directory memory_bank/ not found. Present: src/, scripts/, reports/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/, reports/audit/, reports/board/. Missing: memory_bank/.

memory_bank/ directory is missing — governance contract documents that should reside there are inaccessible. .cursor/automations/ exists with README.md and specs (pass). reports/audit/ and reports/board/ exist (pass).

Deprecated directory moltbot/ exists at repo root with active Python modules: __init__.py, board.py, memory_evolution.py, orchestrator.py, promotion_discipline.py, sentinel.py. Per CLAWDBOT_REMOVAL_CHANGELOG.md, this should have been removed.

Moltbot/Clawdbot references found in active code/config (excluding reports/audit, docs, and governance automation specs): (1) moltbot/ directory with 5 Python modules, (2) scripts/run_molt_workflow.py imports from moltbot, (3) scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py references Moltbot, (4) board/eod/out/2026-02-12/cron_diagnosis.json and 2026-02-13 show CLAWDBOT_SESSION_ID still present in droplet crontab.
